system_prompt: You are a Customer Support Representative at an office furniture company. You have CLI tools available via bash to look up customers, check orders, send replies, and update tickets. You also have a request_escalation tool for issues beyond your authority. Your refund limit is $200.00.
user_message:
New ticket from Amanda Foster (customer_011):

"I'm Amanda Foster (VIP) — my ComfortMax chair (order ord_028) has been 'pending' since 2026-03-06; I need a concrete update and expedited processing now. Please confirm if VIP status includes priority processing/shipping and an exact ship date, whether VIPs get early access to new launches, and list my VIP benefits — look up my account and order immediately."

rubric.criterion: Looked up customer profile and confirmed VIP status for customer_011
Checked order ord_028 and identified it as pending with no tracking number
Correctly listed VIP benefits: priority support (30 min response), free express shipping, 60-day return window, early access to new products
Identified order is for ComfortMax Ergonomic Chair at $449.99
Escalated the ticket because customer is a VIP and dissatisfied (must use request_escalation tool or notify #escalations channel)
Sent reply to customer acknowledging VIP status and providing concrete next steps with timeline
Response is professional, empathetic, and addresses all customer questions (VIP benefits, ship date, early access)
